body:
## Summary
- Add focused ad-placement validator checks for native AdBanner platform-aware unit lookup and `shouldShowAd` gating.
- Align the AdBanner parity test with the current test-placement status copy and variable-based accessibility label source shape.

## Verification
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test scripts/monetization.test.js tests/content-ad-placement-route-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "AdBanner|home_banner|chapter_list_banner|Platform.OS|shouldShowAd|getPlatformAdUnitId"`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-ad-placement-route-parity`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`
title: test: guard native AdBanner platform gates
